result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-copydllsafterbuild [command]

CopyDllsAfterBuildLocalTool

Commands:
  run         Run CopyDlls operation.
  init        Initialize environment. Output initial settings JSON file to path specified.
  validate    Confirm setting JSON file is valid or not.

Options:
  --completion    Generate a shell completion code
  -h, --help      Show help message
  --version       Show version

  --setting-file <String>     (Default: CopySettings.json)
